mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reserve WHERE time = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-%d')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reserve WHERE time = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-%d') AND status = '已叫号'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reserve WHERE time = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-%d') AND status = '未叫号'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reserve WHERE time = DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d') UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reserve WHERE time = DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 5 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d') UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reserve WHERE time = DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 4 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d') UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reserve WHERE time = DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d') UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reserve WHERE time = DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 2 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d') UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reserve WHERE time = DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d') UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reserve WHERE time = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-%d')
